response.justification: Exceptional full-stack engineer with 13+ years of diverse experience, including current work on AI agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks that directly align with the role's AI agent requirement. Demonstrates strong backend, infrastructure, and cloud expertise across the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React). Primary gaps are lack of explicit Nest.js mention and limited visibility into Jest/Vitest expertise, though extensive Node.js and testing culture experience suggest strong foundation.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack experience across web, mobile, and backend with demonstrated proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes
Current role explicitly involves AI agent infrastructure and developer tooling—directly aligned with job's required AI agent development skills
Strong engineering craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, microservices architecture, and high-performance systems experience at companies handling millions of requests
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite being listed as primary backend stack; relies on general Node.js framework experience rather than framework-specific expertise
Limited evidence of Jest/Vitest/Playwright testing expertise despite these being required skills; testing background comes from DLang and other language ecosystems
Career trajectory shows deep expertise across diverse technologies (DLang, iOS, robotics) rather than focused full-stack web development; may lack recent hands-on experience with core tech stack
